title: Digi Linerless Thermal Labels, 58mm x 65mm, 40mm Core, Chill Adhesive, 50 Rolls (1 Box)
features: For use with a range of digi scales
description: Box will contain 50 rolls of linerless thermal digi-labels with chill adhesive 58mm width x 65mm length per label, 40mm cores £186.00 price includes VAT and delivery per box (50 rolls) Direct thermal linerless rolls with chill adhesive and top coated face. Ideal for use within the food markets using digi scales, e.g. - Bizerba - Mettler - Avery Fits Digi SM120, FM5300 & SM6000 printers Sent via. ParcelForce complete with a VAT invoice Box price £186.00 inc VAT
